title: Birds Do It
writer: Art Arthur, Leonard B. Kaufman, Arnie Kogen
actors: Soupy Sales, Tab Hunter, Arthur O'Connell
plot: Melvin Byrd, who dreams of being a scientist, is a Cape Kennedy "miniscule molecular particle surveillance monitor" - in short, a janitor. His job is to keep a major rocket project completely dust-free, and this he does with his o...
